revenant.title: Defeat the Ignited Revenant (Cataclysm — fire-based boss, spawns after Ancient Remnant kill)

subtitle.text: Fire as transformation, not destruction. Until it becomes destruction.

description: The Ignited Revenant becomes available after the Ancient Remnant falls.
It is a fire-based Cataclysm boss — heavy fire damage output.
The Magma Gelatin from Ch06 works here — 60 seconds per serving.
Netherite armor reduces fire damage but does not eliminate it.
The Ignited Revenant is an intermediate step on the path to Ignis.
Each Cataclysm boss opens the next.
The chain does not offer shortcuts.
→ Have 4 Fire Resistance potions for this and subsequent fights
